title: 2 Head Jumbo Rose Spray - Yellow - Artificial Flowers
description: Total Height: 112Cm Flower Width: 18Cm An Exceptionally Tall Stemmed Spray Perfect For Use In A Large Vase Or Even Cut To Use In Arrangements.Features 1 Extra Large Head With A Large Bud Surrounded By Lots Of Foliage, Available In A Range Of Colours.
